name: moodmate-root
description: 1,000,000% Professional Master Root for MoodMate (Capstone Final Submission)

scripts.update:all: npm run install:all && npm run update:all --prefix backend && npm run update:all --prefix frontend
scripts.clean:all: npx rimraf backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules && npm run install:all
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run ip:sync --prefix backend
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run tunnel --prefix frontend"
